userMessage: Set up CAN FD decode on B1 source CH2 500kbps nominal 2Mbps data phase ISO standard. Set up search on B1 for CAN FD error frames. Set edge trigger on CH2 rising 1.65V. Enable FastFrame 500 frames single sequence. After capture query FastFrame timestamp for all frames, save CH2 waveform as binary and screenshot.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit applyable TekAutomate JSON for this request.

Missing source-of-truth verification for this turn:
- FastFrame timestamp query command for all frames: not verified.
- The exact command needed to complete CAN bus search setup for “CAN FD error frames” was not fully verified from retrieved results.
- SCPI materialization outputs were not retrieved for the verified headers, so I should fail closed rather than guess final command strings.

Verified pieces I did have were:
- `BUS:B<x>:TYPe`
- `BUS:B<x>:CAN:SOUrce`
- `BUS:B<x>:CAN:BITRate`
- `BUS:B<x>:CAN:FD:BITRate`
- `BUS:B<x>:CAN:STANDard`
- `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:TYPe`
- `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:BUS:SOUrce`
- `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:BUS:CAN:FRAMEtype`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:EDGE:SOUrce`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:EDGE:SLOpe`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:LEVel:CH<x>`
- `HORizontal:FASTframe:STATE`
- `HORizontal:FASTframe:COUNt`
- `ACQuire:STOPAfter`
- `ACQuire:STATE`

If you want, on the next turn I can build the full applyable flow once the missing FastFrame timestamp command and final search-condition command are verified/materialized.
